name: Tomes & Talismans
overview: Tomes & Talismans is a 1986 educational television series produced by Mississippi Public Broadcasting, consisting of thirteen 20-minute episodes presented as a dramatic serial story. Each episode defines, illustrates, and reviews specific library research concepts.

trailers.title: LET'S PLAY A GAME — Tomes & Talismans Trivia
